allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:',d.get\('main'\)\); print\('module:',d.get\('module'\)\); print\('exports keys:',list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:10] if isinstance\(d.get\('exports'\),dict\) else d.get\('exports'\)\); print\('deps:',d.get\('dependencies'\)\); print\('peer:',d.get\('peerDependencies'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/lr.json'\); console.log\('main:',d.main\); console.log\('module:',d.module\); console.log\('types:',d.types\); console.log\('exports:',JSON.stringify\(d.exports\).slice\(0,400\)\); console.log\('deps:',d.dependencies\); console.log\('peer:',d.peerDependencies\)")
